expectations.text: Creates a new project note in the notes/ directory (following existing vault convention)
expectations.evidence: project-website-redesign.md was created and copied to outputs. The file name follows the existing convention (project-api-migration.md pattern). From the transcript, the file was created in notes/ directory.

expectations.text: New note has YAML frontmatter with title, status, priority (high/1), tags, due date (2026-04-15), and related fields
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter contains: title: Website Redesign, status: planning, priority: 1, tags: [project, active, marketing], due: 2026-04-15, related: [Projects MOC, project-api-migration]. All required fields present.

expectations.text: Frontmatter related field includes a wikilink to project-api-migration
Note body mentions marketing team involvement
expectations.evidence: Body mentions 'collaboration with the marketing team' in Overview and 'Coordinate with marketing team on content strategy' in Goals.

expectations.text: Uses wikilinks [[...]] for all internal references, not markdown links
expectations.evidence: All references use wikilink format: [[project-api-migration]], [[Projects MOC]], [[Work MOC]]. No markdown-style links found.

expectations.text: Updates MOCs/Projects MOC.md to include the new Website Redesign project
expectations.evidence: Projects MOC.md line 10 contains '- [[project-website-redesign]] — Website Redesign (due April 15, high priority)' under Active Projects.

expectations.text: Updates MOCs/Work MOC.md to include the new project
expectations.evidence: Work MOC.md line 11 contains '- [[project-website-redesign]]' under Projects section.

expectations.text: Respects the existing MOC structure rather than imposing a different organization system
expectations.evidence: Projects MOC.md retains its original structure (tags frontmatter, Active/Completed sections). Work MOC.md retains its structure (Projects/References sections). New entries added within existing sections.

expectations.text: New note contains bidirectional link — links to API migration AND is listed in the MOCs that API migration is in
expectations.evidence: project-website-redesign.md links to [[project-api-migration]] multiple times. project-api-migration.md was updated to include [[project-website-redesign]] in its related frontmatter (line 11). Both are listed in Projects MOC.md and Work MOC.md.
